message.content:
@startuml

skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false

component "«page»\nmeetstars.html" as meetstars
component "«controller»\nMeetStars" as MeetStars

component "«page»\nmeet_external_link_edit.html" as meetexternallinkedit
component "«controller»\nMeetLinkEdit" as MeetLinkEdit

component "«page»\nmeet_external_links_edit.html" as meetexternallinksedit
component "«controller»\nMeetLinksEdit" as MeetLinksEdit

component "«page»\nmeet_view.html" as meetview
component "«controller»\nMeetView" as MeetView

component "«page»\ntalktomeetorganizer.html" as talktomeetorganizer
component "«controller»\nTalkToMeetOrganizer" as TalkToMeetOrganizer

component "«page»\ntalktofriend.html" as talktofriend
component "«controller»\nTalkToFriend" as TalkToFriend

component "«page»\nmailbox_messages.html" as mailboxmessages
component "«controller»\nConversation" as Conversation

component "«page»\nmailboxes.html" as mailboxes
component "«controller»\nConversations" as Conversations

component "«page»\nfriends.html" as friends
component "«controller»\nFriends" as Friends

component "«page»\nuser.html" as user
component "«controller»\nFriendship" as Friendship

component "«page»\nmyaccount.html" as myaccount
component "«controller»\nMyAccount" as MyAccount

meetstars -[dashed]-> MeetStars : «controls»
meetexternallinkedit -[dashed]-> MeetLinkEdit : «controls»
meetexternallinksedit -[dashed]-> MeetLinksEdit : «controls»
meetview -[dashed]-> MeetView : «controls»
talktomeetorganizer -[dashed]-> TalkToMeetOrganizer : «controls»
talktofriend -[dashed]-> TalkToFriend : «controls»
mailboxmessages -[dashed]-> Conversation : «controls»
mailboxes -[dashed]-> Conversations : «controls»
friends -[dashed]-> Friends : «controls»
user -[dashed]-> Friendship : «controls»
myaccount -[dashed]-> MyAccount : «controls»

@enduml
